text.title: Freelancer Personal CRM (Minimal) Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable inputs to a rule from `01-core-rules.xml`. MANDATORY for every methodology — even flat ones — per F-066 DoD.

decision-tree.root-question: Solo freelancer with ≥3 active prospects+clients AND no existing CRM?

branch.question: ≥30 min/week review capacity AND a table tool available?
